name: Steak Tartare
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Fresh, raw sirloin or tenderloin beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat in a blender or food processor and process until meat is finely chopped.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (capers, Worcestershire sauce, Dijon mustard, and chopped onion) to the meat and continue processing until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Form the mixture into a ball.
4. Keep refrigerated until ready to serve.
5. Serve with cocktail rye bread.
Yield: 1 Cup
